metadata.description: Official Claude Code skills for ZenMux

plugins.name: zenmux-context
plugins.description: ZenMux documentation expert. Answers questions about product features, API usage, integration, configuration, and best practices by reading the latest official docs. Supports both English and Chinese.

plugins.name: zenmux-usage
plugins.description: Query real-time ZenMux account data via the Management API: subscription detail, quota usage, account status, Flow rate, PAYG balance, and per-generation cost/token breakdown.
